seed_execution_case.description: Replay the main flow with default dummy model and specific penalties to reproduce observed stdout.
seed_execution_case.call_code:
model = DummyNativeModel()
extended_model, weights = create_extended_model(
    model,
    db_penalty=5,
    ex_penalty=2,
    tp_penalty=3,
    penalties={"c1_db_rxn": 10}
)
result = (extended_model, weights)
print("Extended model reactions:", extended_model.reactions)
print("Weights:", weights)
